title: sideritis ilicifolia subsp. luciae
intro: Sideritis ilicifolia subsp. luciae, also known as the Iberian ironwort, is a plant species within the genus Sideritis. It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Sideritis ilicifolia subsp. luciae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties, making it a valuable herb for traditional medicine. Sideritis ilicifolia subsp. luciae can be prepared as teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
